name: Zap-gun
description:
Bro, have you ever wanted to turn someone into a suit?! This is your chance, that's what Zap-Gun is for, just use it on your friend lol

Or on your favorite character😈

I also didn't add the script and the character's peraina, because it's a damn gun and it's up to the user how and on whom to use it:р

And it pisses me off that there are so few tokens here because of this! Although it doesn't matter, I suggest you use deepseek for the bot
creator: Lerikpgaoa21
